vocab.exampleEn: I prefer practical advice because I can apply it immediately.
vocab.exampleZh: 我更喜欢实用建议，因为我可以马上用。
vocab.upgradeEn: Use practical when explaining why something is useful.
vocab.upgradeZh: 解释某件事为什么有用时，用 practical。

cycle.summaryEn: Build clean sentences with the right tense, articles, and clause control.
cycle.summaryZh: 把时态、冠词和从句控制好，句子更稳。

frame.useEn: Use to give a clear opinion.

meaningEn: This speaking word helps Becky sound clearer and more natural.
meaningZh: 这个口语词可以帮助 Becky 说得更清楚、更自然。
promptEn: China drill: read the Chinese meaning, shadow the example twice, then make one Becky-style sentence with "practical" using I strongly believe that...
promptZh: 中文母语者练法：先看中文意思，跟读例句两遍，再用 "practical" 和 我强烈认为... 写一句 Becky 自己的话。
sourceEn: This harder word is auto-picked for Becky and refreshes every day with a China-friendly output drill.
sourceZh: 这个高分词会每天自动为 Becky 刷新，并配中文母语者适用的输出练习。
